extract: Thunder Fang (Japanese: かみなりのキバ Thunder Fang) is a damage-dealing Electric-type move introduced in Generation IV. It is: TM66 in Pokémon Sword and Shield. TM009 in Pokémon Scarlet and Violet. TM021 in Pokémon Legends: Z-A. It can be thought of as a counterpart to Ice Fang and Fire Fang, having similar names and effects.
